namedNodes.name: HomePlayNote
namedNodes.text: Collect 24 honey drops and clear 18 jelly tiles.

namedNodes.name: HomeEventSectionBody
namedNodes.text: Short-session events and streak rewards designed for casual portrait play.

namedNodes.name: HomeDailyStreakBody
namedNodes.text: Finish one stage to unlock a rainbow rocket and 30 bonus coins.

namedNodes.name: HomeTreasureCruiseBody
namedNodes.text: Chain five win streaks to fill the picnic map and claim a golden chest.

namedNodes.name: HomeJourneyBody
namedNodes.text: You are one win away from the orchard gate. Keep your boosters for the honey lane.

namedNodes.name: HomeGoalCardBody
namedNodes.text: Use fewer than 20 moves to keep the streak chest alive.

namedNodes.name: HomeClubCardBody
namedNodes.text: Two more wins this week unlock the shared blossom chest.

namedNodes.name: LoadingBody
namedNodes.text: Packing boosters, goals, and orchard surprises for your next run.

namedNodes.name: LoadingLevelCardBody
namedNodes.text: Collect honey drops and clear the jelly lane.

namedNodes.name: LoadingMascotText
namedNodes.text: Poppy is setting the meadow board.

namedNodes.name: LoadingProgressBody
namedNodes.text: Preloading stage goals, booster inventory, and combo popups.

namedNodes.name: LoadingTargetPreviewBody
namedNodes.text: Watch the honey lanes and save rockets for the lower right corner.

namedNodes.name: LoadingTipBody
namedNodes.text: A rocket plus hammer combo is the safest answer when honey crates block the final drop lane.

namedNodes.name: GameplayStageBody
namedNodes.text: Collect honey drops and clear the jelly lane before moves run out.

namedNodes.name: GameplayGoalSummaryBody
namedNodes.text: The jelly lane is concentrated on the lower right. Save your rocket for the final corner after the honey column opens.
